demographics.living_situation: lives alone in a private residence

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: The pain is tearing through my nerves, I haven't slept in three days, and I just cannot endure another minute of this.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: My back pain flared up badly three days ago and I have not slept at all since. I am at the end of my rope and I need something to help me get through tonight.

symptom_narrative.onset: a severe flare started three days ago, right after I did a bit of gardening
symptom_narrative.duration: the flare is three days old; the back pain itself has been there for about 18 months
symptom_narrative.character: burning, tearing, shooting pain like it is running along my nerves
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the worst it has ever been, I can't get comfortable in any position
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: low back, the same spot as my old injury
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant, never lets up, worse when I move
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing has helped, not even the extra tablets I have been taking
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: any movement, and lying still for too long
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: no sleep at all for three nights, complete exhaustion, feeling hopeless and tearful, I have stopped doing everything and just stay in bed
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I have had flares before but never this bad and never with no sleep like this
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I am bedbound today, I cannot do anything at all

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: long-standing back pain after an injury about 18 months ago
past_medical_history.how_managed: regular nerve-pain tablets and a low-dose tablet at night, plus over-the-counter painkillers

current_medications_as_reported.dose_as_patient_reports: I have been taking a lot more than usual over the last few days trying to get on top of it, but it hasn't touched the pain

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone; has withdrawn from all normal activities over the last few days and has not been leaving the bedroom

objective_data_offered.value: zero hours of sleep over the past three nights
sounds exhausted and tearful on the call, keeps shifting around trying to get comfortable
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: self-described over chat; no clinician observation or video confirmation
